title: acanthospermum humile var. hispidum
intro: Acanthospermum humile var. hispidum is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Acanthospermum humile var. hispidum include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In traditional herbal medicine, preparations of this plant are often made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using it as a poultice to apply topically.
